options.systemMessage:
You have to select the project name and the item the user wants to select separately from this message.
Select the project name from the list by copying the project name without changing the characters:
1. Fortnite
2. Sims
3. Flight Simulator
4. Robux
5. GTA
6. Gacha Life / Avatar World
7. Gorilla Tag
8. Toca
You have to choose the right title from this list. The format of your reply message is:

Project: <Project name>
Item: <Chosen item>

You should repeat this pattern exactly, only changing the values between the <> symbols. If you can't figure out from the user's message what project or item they want to generate, put “Can not understand” in Project field or Item field or both.

parameters.text: Не смог распознать Название проекта или Предмет для генерации, повторите пожалуйста. Вы должны указать Название проекта и предмет, который нужно сгенерировать

options.systemMessage:
"A high-quality 3D rendering of a single [type of clothing], displayed on a clean white or transparent background. The [clothing] is shown from a strictly front view, fully centered in the frame. The lighting is bright, even, and studio-like, emphasizing smooth 3D shading and clearly defined contours. The [clothing] has precise geometry, clean edges, and subtle folds and creases that convey a casual, stylized 3D appearance suitable for game assets or digital catalogs. The materials have a simple, matte, slightly plastic texture without gloss or reflections, creating a colorful, cartoon-like look. All colors are solid, vibrant, and evenly applied, with no patterns, no graphic elements, no lines, no logos, no ornaments. No shadows on the floor. No mannequins, no human models, no accessories, no labels, no additional elements. The [clothing] is fully isolated, surrounded by empty space."

You should use this prompt as a reference, this prompt is a general prompt for a styles. You should make a prompt for a random item from: { pants, hat, shirt }. Describe chosen item and make a prompt for this exact item using general style prompt, choose a color and specific unique elements for this item. Prompt must to be in English, plain text, without formatting

"Create a detailed, high-resolution vector illustration in the style of "Avatar World." The graphic must adhere to these guidelines:

Draw in a clean, vibrant cartoon style characteristic of "Avatar World": use strong black outlines and solid, flat color fills—no gradients, textures, or photo-realistic effects.

The visual design should be playful and modern, with clear, expressive forms suitable for both children's and adult avatars.

Angle & Perspective: Each item must be depicted from a slightly angled (three-quarter) front-facing view, rather than a strict front-on perspective. The representation should suggest that the character or clothing is standing or oriented a little to the side (not strictly profile, not strictly frontal), matching the stylized approach of "Avatar World" assets.

Isolation: Every generated element (hair, tops, shoes, eyes, mouths, eyebrows, accessories, or emotions) should appear isolated, floating independently in the frame—never attached to a body, head, or any background. The image is to be free of scenery, people, or context elements.

Stylization of Items: Shoes, clothes, hairstyles, and accessories should match the whimsical, cute proportions seen in Avatar World, featuring playful color combinations, subtle details, and an overall "soft" and friendly look (see provided image references and in-game examples for shoes).

The asset should be visually unified—no overlapping or merging with other objects.

Each element must be equally suitable for all gender expressions unless a direction is specifically added.

Emotions and accessory icons (tears, anger marks, loading symbols, etc.) should be easily readable, bold, and match the overall cartoon style.

Avoid shadows, perspective drawing, or layered complexity; use pure flat fills and bold outlines throughout.

All parts must be clearly visible and distinct at a slightly turned angle."

You should use this prompt as a reference, this prompt is a general prompt for a styles. You should make a prompt for a random item from: { pants, hat, shirt }. Describe chosen item and make a prompt for this exact item using general style prompt, choose a color and specific unique elements for this item. Prompt must to be in English, plain text, without formatting

"A high-quality, highly realistic 3D rendering of a single [type of clothing], displayed on a clean light neutral background (white or light grey). The [clothing] is shown from a strictly front view, fully centered in the frame. The lighting is soft, bright, and evenly distributed, creating natural shadows and highlights that enhance the volume and depth of the fabric. The [clothing] features extremely realistic textures and intricate details such as seams, stitching, fine wrinkles, fabric grain, and subtle variations in surface reflectivity. Materials are true-to-life, accurately reproducing the appearance of cotton, linen, denim, or other appropriate fabrics with a natural matte or lightly satin finish. Colors are lifelike, neutral, and softly balanced, without artificial saturation. No patterns, logos, graphic elements, or ornaments unless explicitly described. No shadows on the floor. No mannequins, no human models, no accessories, no labels, no additional elements. The [clothing] is fully isolated, surrounded by empty space, presented in a clean, professional catalog style with maximum realism."

"A high-quality 3D rendering of a single [type of clothing], displayed on a clean white or transparent background. The [clothing] is shown from a strictly front view, fully centered in the frame. The lighting is soft, even, and neutral, with no additional light sources, creating gentle shadows and highlights that define the form without harsh contrasts. The [clothing] features stylized hand-painted textures with smooth gradients and subtle shading, and no outlines or contour lines, giving it a clean, polished appearance suitable for a stylized 3D game like The Sims 4. The material is matte and uniform, with no strong reflections, gloss, or photographic detail. All colors are solid, softly balanced, and slightly stylized to enhance clarity and visual appeal. The geometry is precise, with clean edges, clear seams, readable folds, and small details. No patterns, logos, graphic elements, or ornaments unless explicitly described. No shadows on the floor. No mannequins, no human models, no accessories, no labels, no additional elements. The [clothing] is fully isolated, surrounded by empty space, presented in a clean, professional catalog style for stylized 3D assets."

"A high-quality 3D rendering of a single [type of clothing], designed to fit a stylized toy-like humanoid character with simplified proportions similar to a Roblox figure. The [clothing] is displayed on a clean white or transparent background, shown from a strictly front view, fully centered in the frame. The geometry is smooth and simplified, with no realistic fabric details or wrinkles. The surface has a clean, plastic-like material with a matte finish and very soft, subtle reflections, avoiding any strong gloss or shine. All colors are solid and evenly applied, with a smooth, uniform appearance appropriate for toy parts. The lighting is bright, even, and neutral, creating minimal shadows and gentle highlights to define the form without harsh contrasts. No outlines, no contour lines, no graphic elements, no patterns, no logos, and no ornaments unless explicitly described. No shadows on the floor. No mannequins, no human models, no accessories, no labels, no additional elements. The [clothing] is fully isolated, perfectly scaled to fit the stylized toy character, and presented in a clean, professional catalog style."

"Hyper-realistic, highly detailed digital render, in the style of a modern AAA PC game. Graphic quality and texturing must be top-tier, with advanced lighting, sharp shadows, and realistic material rendering. Each item should feature strong surface details, clear fabric textures or material finishes, and vibrant, rich colors. Visual clarity should match what you see in cutscenes or promotional art of high-budget open-world video games.
Technical requirements:
Strictly front-facing view.
No people, no bodies, no heads, no mannequins, no backgrounds.
The item or hairstyle floats as if worn on an invisible mannequin, showing realistic form and natural drape/volume.
Style:
Clothing and hairstyles must be consistent with the fashion and aesthetics of GTA V—trendy, urban, and casual streetwear for both men and women."

"A high-quality 2D vector illustration of a single [type of element], created in a clean, cartoon-like style. The [element] is shown from a strictly front view, fully centered in the frame. The design features smooth, simplified shapes with clear solid color fills and minimal shading. The outline is uniform, medium thickness, and black or dark-colored, clearly separating the shape from the background. All colors are bright and saturated, evenly applied without gradients or texture unless explicitly described. The lighting is flat and neutral, with no realistic shadows or highlights. No photographic effects, no textures, and no complex details. The illustration is fully isolated on a white or transparent background, presented in a clean, professional vector style suitable for stickers, icons, or game assets."

"A high-quality 2D vector illustration of a single [type of clothing], created in a clean, cartoon-like style closely matching the visual style of simple avatar clothing icons. The [clothing] is shown from a strictly front view, fully centered in the frame. The design features smooth, flat, stylized shapes with solid color fills and no gradients, no reflections, and no soft shadows. The outline is uniform, medium thickness, and black or very dark, clearly defining all edges and details. The shape is simple and slightly boxy, with minimal curves, capturing the playful proportions typical of cartoon avatar outfits. The clothing includes small decorative details such as flat stylized seams, pockets, or buttons to add interest and avoid a primitive look, but without realistic folds or texture. All colors are bright and evenly applied, without any shading or lighting effects. The lighting is completely flat and neutral, with no highlights or 3D effects. No photographic elements, no gradients, no complex shading. The illustration is fully isolated on a white or transparent background, presented in a clean, professional vector style suitable for character customization in casual or kid-friendly games."
